description: Triggered when the user wants to plan, design, or analyze an A/B test or experiment, including hypothesis creation, sample size calculation, and statistical analysis.
should_trigger: I want to run an A/B test on our hero headline
How do I calculate sample size for a split test?
Can you help me write a hypothesis for testing our CTA button color?
We ran an experiment and I have results — is it statistically significant?
Help me design a multivariate test for our pricing page
What's the minimum detectable effect for our conversion test?
I need a test roadmap for Q1 using the ICE scoring framework
should_not_trigger: How do I set up GA4 event tracking on my landing page?
Write copy for our hero section headline
What are the best CRO patterns for a pricing page?
How do I deploy my Next.js app to Coolify?
